content.en:
"Create your own ultimate secret method!"

Ye Tianming came to his senses.

He knew the path to breaking through the Ultimate Strong, and then he prepared for this goal.

However, he still has one more thing to do, and that is to copy the Divine Dimension talent.

The Divine Dimension Domain is the core of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and there are a large number of Divine Dimension talent powerhouses here, and the Divine Dimension Talent level here must be very high.

Over the years, he has also traveled a lot of places and met many highly talented strong people.

And his divine talent is now sixteen stars.

So, he began to walk in the Divine Dimension Domain, looking for sixteen or seventeen-star Divine Dimensional talents.

Soon, he met an eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse with a seventeen-star divine talent, and then copied the opponent's divine talent and fused it into his own divine talent.

However, he didn't encounter an eighteen-star divine talent.

However, after he was promoted to the eighteenth dimensional realm, his copying talent also regained a function, that is, fusion upgrade.

Therefore, he only needs to copy multiple seventeen-star god-dimensional talents to superimpose an eighteen-star god-dimensional talent.

A long time has passed.

Ye Tian copied too many Divine Dimensional talents, such as copying a bunch of sixteen-star Divine Dimensional Talents, and superimposing a seventeen-star Divine Dimensional talent, so as to make up a seventeen-star Divine Dimensional talent.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of god-years had passed.

On this day, he finally gathered enough seventeen-star divine dimensional talents, and then after fusion, the eighteen-star divine dimensional talents came out.

Rumble!!!!!

The eighteen-star divine dimensional talent fused with his body, which brought great pain, but he forcibly endured it.

After a long time, the eighteen-star divine talent was successfully fused.

"It's done, the eighteen-star divine talent, this may be the highest divine talent in the divine dimension of heaven and earth!"

Immediately, he cultivated with the eighteen-star divine dimensional talent.

Rumble!!!!!

A massive amount of divine power poured into the body, refining the body and making the body quickly stronger.

"The eighteen-star divine dimensional talent is really demonic, at this speed, it won't be long before I can raise my body to the limit of the eighteenth dimension!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Really.

Only a hundred god dimensional years had passed, and Ye Tian had reached the limit of the eighteenth dimensional realm, and his physical body had been tempered to the point where he could no longer progress.

At this point, he was faced with the impact of the ultimate realm.

"It's not easy to create your own ultimate secret method, if there is a new ultimate secret method for me to reference, it will be more than ten times easier!"

However, he was not a member of those powerful forces, and it was difficult for him to obtain such an ultimate secret method.

And even if you join, you can't be trusted, and you don't know how many years you have to wait to get the ultimate secret method!

Maybe it would be easier for the Twelve Heavens Sect to obtain the Ultimate Secret Method, but he didn't dare to join the Twelve Heavens Sect, if he encountered the Ultimate Lord, he was afraid that it would be exposed in an instant.

"Let's see if we can get some incomplete ultimate secret methods first!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the years that followed, he searched for the ultimate secret method and gathered resources at the same time.

If he doesn't have enough resources and wealth, he can't afford to buy the ultimate secret method one day!

Time flies, and in a flash, it is tens of thousands of gods.

Ye Tian is still in the eighteenth dimensional realm, but he has created many top-notch killing moves, making his shortcomings almost non-existent.

However, he still did not obtain the ultimate secret method, but he had heard the news of the ultimate secret method many times, and it turned out to be fake news.

And in the process of searching for the ultimate secret method, he also made friends with some powerhouses in the eighteen-dimensional realm, and they were also looking for the ultimate secret method, and they knew each other.

this day.

Ye Tian received the news that a certain Ultimate Secret Method, one of the Twelve Sects, took out a broken Ultimate Secret Method and put it up for auction.

Although it is a crippled ultimate secret method, it can also allow an eighteen-dimensional powerhouse to complete the ultimate polarization of spiritual power, but the success rate is very low, and even if it breaks through, the potential is exhausted, and there is no hope for the ultimate master realm.

However, there will still be many eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses who are eager to obtain such an ultimate secret method.

And this also attracted Ye Tian.

......

Shunyu City.

Ye Tian came here and found that many eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses had come here.

Shunyu City was the venue for this auction, and it belonged to one of the territories of the Yao Sun Heavenly Sect, one of the Twelve Heavenly Sects.

Ye Tian also found some friends, all of whom they met on the way to find the ultimate secret method, they were friends in the past, but now they are competitors.

No one will give up such an ultimate secret method, if it is snatched, they will fight desperately, but they will not give any face.

However, everyone still greets politely when they meet.

At the auction venue, a venerable eighteen-dimensional powerhouse came, everyone was for the incomplete ultimate secret method, and there were some sixteenth-dimensional and seventeenth-dimensional powerhouses, they were not for the ultimate secret method, but for other treasures.

There are a lot of good things in such an auction, but there are more than the ultimate secret methods that are incomplete.

Soon.

The auction began, and one treasure after another appeared.

Ye Tian even found a dimensional star weapon, this is definitely not a thing of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, it should be from the multidimensional territory or a place similar to the multidimensional territory, the powerhouses of these places were killed by the ultimate lord in the Dimension Sea, the treasures on their bodies were confiscated, and then brought back to the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth.

However, after these things fell into the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, they lost their proper function and could only play a little use.

But as long as it is useful, these strong people are willing to pay a huge price for bidding.

But Ye Tian didn't have much interest in these things, he closed his eyes and quietly breathed, waiting for the auction of the incomplete ultimate secret method.

Time passed slowly, and gradually came to the final moment of the auction.

Finally, the ultimate secret method of the finale item is out.

The last finale item, a broken ultimate secret method, comes from the Yao Sun Heavenly Sect, and it is absolutely true. The starting price is 300 million Shenwei Heavenly Coins!"

The auctioneer shouted.

Immediately, one by one, the eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses began to bid wildly.

600 million!

Billion Altars!

Billion!

These eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses are all crazy.

And Ye Tian also participated in the auction, he prepared five billion Shenwei Heavenly Coins, but gradually found that his money seemed to be insufficient!

Soon, someone opened 5.1 billion Shenwei Heavenly Coins.

Helpless, Ye Tian could only give up the bidding.

In the end, the ultimate secret method was auctioned off by an eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse for 12.3 billion Divine Dimension Heavenly Coins.

I have to say that these eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses who have lived for countless years are indeed very rich, and Ye Tian can't compare to them in a short period of time.

However, this does not mean that this eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse can be successfully taken away.

Ye Tian still has hope.
